case_title: CARLA A PEREZ VS. ALYSHA PAYAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>); REMARKS: ALEXIS RODRIGUEZ ACCEPTED THE DOCUMENTS ON BEHALF OF ALYSHA PAYAN. **SEE ABOVE REMARK** SERVED AUG-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAYAN, ALYSHA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>);REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED AUG-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALEXIS
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY PEREZ, CARLA A PAYAN, ALYSHA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, CARLA A AS TO DEFENDANT PAYAN, ALYSHA RODRIGUEZ, ALEXIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE AT REQUEST OF DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, CARLA A ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, CARLA A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYAN, ALYSHA $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,075.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ. ONLY DEFENDANT PAYAN SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. COSTS SHALL BE PAID TO COURT AS PLAINTIFF WAS GRANTED A FEE WAIVER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS FEE WAIVER [PAYMENT OF FEES FOR SMALL CLAIMS FILING] FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, CARLA A

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-21-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CARLA A. PEREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXIS RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAYAN CALLED THE COURT AND INFORMED THE CLERK THAT SHE HAS COVID AND WAS HOSPITALIZED LAST WEEKEND. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN ALLOWS A SECOND CONTINUANCE FOR THIS DEFENDANT WITH THE CONDITION THAT THE DEFENDANT IS TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST AND SUBMIT EXHIBITS TO THE COURT AND PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. IF THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING THE CASE WILL BE HEARD WITHOUT HER. DEFENDANT PAYAN AGREES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, AND DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN TO OCT-30-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CARLA A. PEREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXIS RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN'S TELEPHONE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO HER EMERGENCY SITUATION. DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN CONFIRMS VIA TELEPHONE THAT SHE WAIVES ANY ISSUES AS TO THE PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO HER. THERE IS A PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXIS RODRIGUEZ. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANTS REGARDING THE OCTOBER 30, 2023 COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: STEPHEN M. MURPHY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF CARLA A PEREZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS PATRICK POWER. DEFENDANT ALYSHA PAYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXIS RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
